title: Laminate Flooring
shortDescription: High-density AC-4 grade laminate flooring with a natural wood finish. Perfect for modern residential and commercial interiors in Delhi NCR.
longDescription:
Upgrade your space with Goals Floors' Cobra Premium Laminate Flooring series. Engineered with a High-Density Fiber (HDF) core and boasting an AC-4 commercial grade rating, this flooring is built to withstand the demanding lifestyles and extreme climate of Gurugram and Delhi NCR. Whether you are renovating a luxury apartment on Golf Course Road or outfitting a high-traffic corporate office in Cyber City, our laminate series offers the perfect blend of aesthetic elegance and rugged durability.

The natural surface texture perfectly mimics real hardwood without the exorbitant cost or heavy maintenance. It is scratch-resistant, cigarette burn resistant, and incredibly easy to clean. With our advanced AAR Click-lock system, installation is fast, seamless, and entirely glue-free. Choose Goals Floors for authentic quality, direct-importer pricing, and lightning-fast express dispatch across the NCR region.

features.title: AC-4 Commercial Grade
features.description: Highly durable and scratch-resistant, perfect for heavy foot traffic in corporate offices, retail stores, and active homes.

features.title: HDF Core Durability
features.description: Manufactured with High-Density Fiberboard, providing excellent stability and impact resistance compared to standard MDF flooring.

features.title: Stain & Burn Resistant
features.description: The protective wear layer is resistant to domestic chemicals, stains, and even accidental cigarette burns.

features.title: Seamless Click Installation
features.description: Features the precision AAR Click system for a flawless, gap-free floating installation without any messy adhesives.

features.title: Eco-Friendly & Safe
features.description: Made from sustainable materials, it is completely safe for indoor air quality, making it ideal for bedrooms and kids' play areas.

features.title: Easy Maintenance
features.description: Does not trap dust or allergens. A simple sweep and a slightly damp mop are all it takes to keep it looking brand new.

installation: Extremely fast, dry installation. The subfloor must be flat, clean, and dry. An acoustic foam underlay is laid down first, and then the laminate planks are clicked together using the AAR Click system. Skirting and T-profiles are required for a neat edge finish and expansion gaps.
maintenance: Virtually maintenance-free. Sweep or vacuum regularly. For deep cleaning, use a slightly damp microfiber mop with a laminate-approved cleaner. Strictly avoid pouring water directly, steam cleaners, or abrasive scrubbers.

faqs.question: What does AC-4 Grade mean for laminate flooring?
faqs.answer: AC-4 is a commercial durability rating. It means the flooring is highly resistant to abrasion, impact, and stains, making it perfectly suitable for both busy homes and commercial spaces like offices in Gurugram.

faqs.question: Can I install this laminate flooring over my existing tiles?
faqs.answer: Yes! As long as your existing tile floor is flat, solid, and completely dry, our laminate flooring can be installed directly over it using a foam underlay, saving you demolition costs.

faqs.question: Is laminate flooring waterproof?
faqs.answer: Standard laminate is water-resistant, not 100% waterproof. It can handle accidental spills if wiped up quickly, but it should not be installed in wet areas like bathrooms or open balconies.

faqs.question: Does Goals Floors offer wholesale pricing for builders in Delhi NCR?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. As direct importers, we offer highly competitive B2B wholesale pricing and bulk project discounts for architects, interior designers, and contractors across Delhi NCR.

faqs.question: How do I calculate how many boxes I need?
faqs.answer: Measure your room's length and width in feet to get the total square footage. Divide that number by 20.62 (coverage per box). We recommend adding 5-8% extra for cutting wastage.

faqs.question: What is the difference between HDF and MDF core?
faqs.answer: HDF (High-Density Fiberboard) is much denser, stronger, and more moisture-resistant than MDF (Medium-Density Fiberboard). Our flooring uses strictly premium HDF for maximum longevity.

faqs.question: Will this flooring attract termites?
faqs.answer: Our HDF core is treated during the manufacturing process to be highly resistant to termites and borers, providing peace of mind for Indian households.

faqs.question: Do I need to buy skirting and profiles separately?
faqs.answer: Yes, matching skirting boards (to cover wall expansion gaps) and T-profiles (for doorways) are essential for a professional finish and are available separately in matching shades.

faqs.question: How quickly can you deliver to a project site in Noida?
faqs.answer: Thanks to our massive central warehouse in Gurugram, we offer an industry-first express dispatch for all in-stock laminate shades across the Delhi NCR region.

faqs.question: How long does the installation process take?
faqs.answer: Because of the AAR Click system, a standard 3-bedroom apartment can typically be floored in just 1 to 2 days without any messy cement or curing time.

installedImages.alt: Modern Delhi Apartment Living Room with Light Oak Laminate Flooring
High-Traffic Corporate Reception in Gurgaon with Dark Walnut Laminate

installationSteps.title: Prepare the Subfloor
installationSteps.description: Make sure the existing floor is ready:
points: Ensure the floor is completely level
installationSteps.tip: A flat subfloor prevents the click-lock joints from breaking under pressure.

installationSteps.title: Lay the Underlayment
points: Roll out the acoustic foam underlay
Tape the seams together so it doesn't shift
Do not overlap the foam layers

installationSteps.title: Click & Lock Installation
points: Insert the tongue into the groove of the previous plank
Press down flat to lock it seamlessly
installationSteps.tip: Stagger the joints (like brickwork) for maximum structural strength.

installationSteps.title: Maintain Expansion Gaps
points: Leave an 8mm-10mm gap around all walls
Use spacer blocks during installation to hold the gap
installationSteps.tip: Laminate expands slightly with weather; this gap prevents it from buckling.

afterInstallation.title: Finishing Touches
points: Install matching skirting boards to cover the expansion gaps
Install T-profiles at doorways or room transitions
afterInstallation.tip: Wait 24 hours before moving very heavy furniture, and use felt pads under table and chair legs.
